description: Milestone 2b: Discourse and Todos boundaries with fake repositories, believable stub UI, and docs hardening. No real network calls. Enforce Context7 usage for API/library correctness.

userStories.title: Discourse domain models
userStories.description: Define domain models for forum content without calling Discourse APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Domain models exist for Topic, Post, and UserSummary
Models are independent of API JSON shape
No networking code added
Models live in Domain/Discourse
Context7 consulted for Discourse API concepts and typical entities; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Discourse repository protocol and fake implementation
userStories.description: Provide a repository abstraction for forum data with a fake implementation and wire it into the Forum tab ViewModel.
acceptanceCriteria: DiscourseRepository protocol exists
FakeDiscourseRepository returns static in-memory data
Forum tab displays fake topics via a ViewModel (no hard-coded UI placeholders)
No HTTP or WebSocket calls are made
Context7 consulted for Swift concurrency patterns (async/await) in repository APIs; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Todos domain and repository stub
userStories.description: Create a clean boundary for meine-piraten.de tasks using a fake repository.
acceptanceCriteria: Todo domain entity exists
TodoRepository protocol exists
FakeTodoRepository returns sample todos
Todos tab displays fake tasks via a ViewModel
Context7 consulted for best practices in modeling task lists in SwiftUI (identifiable, list rendering); summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Believable stub data across Forum, Todos, Profile
userStories.description: Replace empty placeholders with believable stub content so the app looks usable while integrations are pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Forum tab shows topic titles and authors
Todos tab shows task title and owning group
Profile tab shows stub user information (from AuthRepository / domain model)
Placeholder nature is clear in code comments
Context7 consulted for current SwiftUI List and NavigationStack patterns; summary added to progress.txt

userStories.title: Documentation: open questions and threat model update for integrations
userStories.description: Document unknowns and security considerations before real integrations.
acceptanceCriteria: Docs/OPEN_QUESTIONS.md updated with: Piratenlogin protocol details, Discourse auth strategy, Todos API schema, rate limiting/permissions
Docs/THREAT_MODEL.md updated for tokens, local storage, member data exposure and trust boundaries
No secrets or endpoints are introduced
Context7 consulted for current mobile auth security guidance (token storage, session handling); summary added to progress.txt
